title: PM Cram study guide
description: A read-and-absorb study guide (mindset, agile, exam strategy). Text only — no images. Identified by title (case-insensitive). Sections render without a markdown parser: a blank line separates paragraphs, and lines starting with '- ' become bullets.

title.description: Guide name. Natural key used to dedupe across files (case-insensitive).

category.description: Grouping shown in the app, e.g. Mindset, Agile, Exam strategy.

summary.description: One-line description shown in the guide list and at the top of the reader.

body.description: Plain text. Blank line = new paragraph; lines starting with '- ' render as a bullet list.

tip.description: Optional exam-tip callout, shown highlighted under the section.

figure.description: Optional diagram. Provide EITHER an inline SVG string (vector, theme-aware, preferred) OR a raster image path (repo-relative, e.g. content/assets/charts/x.png, shown on a light figure card).

svg.description: Inline <svg> markup. Use single quotes for attributes and 'currentColor' for axes/labels so it themes.

image.description: Repo-relative path or absolute URL of a raster image.

signals.description: OPTIONAL. Keypoints for this section — shown as an 'Exam signal' card.

trace.description: OPTIONAL. Ordered reasoning steps rendered as a numbered 'Decision trace'.

rules.description: OPTIONAL. Reusable takeaways (term — meaning) shown as rule cards.

kicker.description: OPTIONAL. Mono kicker shown above the heading.

blocks.description: OPTIONAL. Ordered structured blocks: tip / steps / cards / table / terms / formulas.

topics.description: OPTIONAL. Top-level study topics (filter chips) for the Guides page, e.g. 'Exam Strategy', 'PMBOK 8', 'Formulae'.
